results.title: Rewind Cup — Relive Every World Cup
results.raw_content:
# Rewind Cup tournament replay

The World Cup archive

## Pick a year. Relive the World Cup.

Journey from Uruguay 1930 to Canada, Mexico & USA 2026 through fixtures, stories and match highlights.
